title: Garlicky Syrian Garlic Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful one-pot dish combining smoky paprika with garlic and other whole30-friendly ingredients for a fluffy and savory meal.
instructions: Chop the onions and garlic into small pieces.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add chopped onions, sauté until translucent.
Add chopped garlic and cook for about 30 seconds or until fragrant.
Stir in paprika flakes, garlic powder, and red pepper flakes. Cook for another minute.
Toss in pine nuts or almonds and mix well to coat all ingredients with the oil and spices.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes or until flavors are fully integrated and everything is warm and fluffy.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
